linkedin.text:
It feels like Monaco. Without the crowds, and at a fraction of the cost.

Tivat's Porto Montenegro is a superyacht marina cradled in a fjord, mountains falling straight into glassy turquoise water. Charter a yacht for the closing dinner. Cruise the Bay of Kotor at sunrise. End the night dockside under the peaks.

This is the reward that tells your people they've arrived.

📅 Book a free 30-minute call about Tivat.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #Leadership #Montenegro #MICE #B2BEvents

Charter a yacht for the closing dinner. Cruise the Bay of Kotor at sunrise. Monaco vibes, none of the crowds.

facebook.text:
Everyone knows Monaco. Almost no one knows Tivat — yet. 🛥️

Porto Montenegro is a superyacht marina cradled in a fjord, mountains falling straight into glassy turquoise water. Charter a yacht for the closing dinner, take the team up the Bay of Kotor at sunrise, end the night dockside under the peaks.

It feels like the Riviera without the crowds, and it tells your people they've truly arrived.

Ever heard of Tivat? Send us a message and we'll show you why your team should. 👇

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #Montenegro #LuxuryTravel #MICE

image_prompt: Aerial view over Porto Montenegro in Tivat at golden hour, rows of gleaming superyachts moored along the marina, the deep fjord-like Bay of Kotor framed by dramatic dark mountains plunging into still turquoise water, tiny figures strolling the waterfront promenade far below, soft haze on the distant peaks. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
